name: Early Comp Settlements Taylorsville

mainEntity.name: Can I settle workers comp early in Taylorsville before MMI?
mainEntity.text: Can I settle workers comp early in Taylorsville before MMI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, lump-sum settlement via stipulation, Labor Commission approval required[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Taylorsville: Early buyout risks future needs. Calculate lifetime value; attorney negotiates best terms[3][4].

description: Yes, lump-sum settlement via stipulation, Labor Commission approval required[4].
